name: Horatio State Bank
description_short: Community bank serving Arkansas since 1905, offering checking, savings, CDs, loans, and IRAs with FDIC insurance and online banking access.
description_long: Horatio State Bank is a traditional community bank that has been serving its local Arkansas market since 1905. Based in Horatio, AR, the bank operates as a full-service financial institution backed by FDIC insurance, meaning deposits are protected by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government up to applicable limits. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. These include checking accounts (with a specific emphasis on Basic Business Checking), savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), various loan products, and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs). The bank maintains an online banking platform with enrollment available to customers, along with loan comparison tools and financial calculators to help customers plan their finances. Horatio State Bank distinguishes itself as a hometown institution with deep local roots, emphasizing personalized service and community presence. The bank maintains three physical branch locations across Arkansas (Horatio, Foreman, and Ashdown) with consistent business hours, plus access to Shazam ATM networks. The bank's leadership team, including President C.E. Hendrix III and Executive Vice President Todd Trimble, provides identifiable management structure typical of community banks. As a traditional regional bank, Horatio State Bank is best suited for customers seeking established banking relationships with local branch access rather than digital-first or specialty financial services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking security features and education
Physical branch locations with teller service
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Three physical branch locations in Arkansas with consistent business hours for in-person service
Online banking platform with enrollment available for remote account management
Multiple account types including business checking, savings, CDs, and IRAs
Built-in financial planning tools including loan comparison and calculators
Established institution with 119+ years of operating history since 1905
Access to Shazam ATM network for expanded cash access
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to three Arkansas locations (Horatio, Foreman, Ashdown)
Website provides no published interest rates, loan terms, or fee schedules for rate comparison
No information available about mobile banking app capabilities or features
Business hours limited to 8 AM-3 PM weekdays (except Friday 8 AM-5 PM), restricting evening/weekend service access
No apparent digital lending or account opening capabilities mentioned on website
best_for: Arkansas residents in the Horatio, Foreman, or Ashdown areas seeking community bank relationships
Small business owners needing local business checking and lending relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured accounts and in-person branch service over digital-first banking
diagnosis: Horatio State Bank is best for Arkansas residents in or near Horatio, Foreman, or Ashdown seeking traditional community banking with FDIC insurance and local branch access. The main caveat is that the bank's limited geographic footprint and lack of published rates/terms online make it primarily suitable for existing local customers or those relocating to the service area, with minimal appeal for customers seeking regional or digital-first banking alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
